kernel/src/arch/riscv64/mmu.rs :: pub (crate) const TRAP_CONTEXT_ADDRESS : usize = TRAMPOLINE_ADDRESS - PAGE_SIZE

kernel/src/arch/riscv64/mmu.rs :: pub (crate) const USER_STACK_TOP : usize = USER_ADDRESS_END - PAGE_SIZE

kernel/src/memory/mm/shootdown.rs :: enum TranslationTransition :: # [doc = " invalid → valid leaf；旧 translation 最多造成一次额外 page fault。"] Publish

kernel/src/memory/mm/shootdown.rs :: enum TranslationTransition :: # [doc = " valid → invalid、permission restriction 或 physical-frame replacement。"] Revoke
